# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [linux, windows, macos]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up custom runner
      run: |
        # Custom setup commands specific to the runner OS
        if [[ ${{ matrix.os }} == 'windows' ]]; then
          # Windows-specific setup
          choco install some-tool -y
        elif [[ ${{ matrix.os }} == 'macos' ]]; then
          # macOS-specific setup
          brew install some-tool
        else
          # Linux-specific setup
          apt-get update && apt-get install -y some-tool
        fi

    - name: Run custom build script
      run: |
        # Path to the custom build script provided by developers
        ./path/to/build_script.sh

    - name: Deploy application
      run: |
        # Custom deployment commands provided by developers
        ./path/to/deploy_script.sh
